case_title: WMW, INC. vs. JONES, DARYL et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, DARYL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, CALENDAR OF APR-16-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SEE EXECUTED ORDER.

CASE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 4 FOR COURT TRIAL.RECUSAL BY JUDGE DOROTHY VON BEROLDINGEN. CASE REASSIGNED BACK TO DEPARTMENT 1 DEPT 1/JUDGE CHOPPELAS/REPORTER:P. DOWLING-TUCKETT/CLERK:G SHULL. 10:20AM: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL IN DEPT 1. ATNY LARRY CARR PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT D.JONES IS NOT PRESENT, AND REMAINS OUTSIDE COURTROOM IN HALL, INFORMING BAILIFF THAT SHE IS ILL. MS. JONES REFUSES TO ENTER DEPT 1 COURTROOM AFTER BEING INFORMED THAT THE TRIAL CAN PROCEED WITHOUT HER. PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDMNT IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST DEFT JONES. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WMW, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, DARYL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEPT 1/JUDGE CHOPPELAS: DEFT ORAL MOT TO CONTINUE TRIAL TO PREPARE AND/OR OBTAIN COUNSEL IS DENIED; UNTIMELY. NOTE: DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES ARE STRICKEN FOLLOWING GRANTING OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SANCITIONS IN DEPT 1.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, DARRYL (SUED AS DARYL) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 OAK STREET, SUITE 506, SAN FRANCISCO $2,178.20 RENT, $474.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,652.20, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS AWARDED TO PLTF PER COST BILL. $625.00 ACKNOWLEDGED CREDIT APPLIED TO PRINCIPAL. JUDGMNT ENTERED PURSUANT TO FAILURE OF DEFT TO RETURN TO DEPT 1 COURTROOM FOR TRIAL IN DEPT 1.
